items.caption: A financial chart titled "10-yr t-bond over last 10 years" from the website "fullertreacymoney.com." it shows the weekly price movement of the us 10-year treasury bond yield (usgg10yr index) from 2006 to 2015. the chart is overlaid with a question in blue text asking if the chart shows any recognizable long-term patterns. the chart itself displays a series of peaks and troughs, indicating fluctuations in the bond yield over the specified period. the website's logo is visible in the top left corner, and there is a disclaimer at the bottom indicating that the website is from 2006-2018.
